name: pilot-sql
description: SQL Server / EF Core codebase governance: schema design (naming, key strategy, constraints, stored-procedure source control), injection defense, migration safety checks, multitenancy isolation, query/performance review, index gap analysis, PII data protection (Always Encrypted, Dynamic Data Masking, TDE verification), ongoing index/statistics maintenance, and backup/restore-drill verification. Ships a reviewer, implementor, and support agent trio: @sql-reviewer finds violations, @sql-implementor fixes them, @sql-support diagnoses query/migration/blocking issues to root cause
